title: brain ingest — --json success output
description: Normalize a REGISTERED source (by id) + commit it as a note. PREVIEW by default (D11): resolve the `source` registry row by id, read its bytes at the `locator`, normalize via @atlas/sources, and print what a capture WOULD produce — persisting nothing. `--apply` grounds a deterministic note (id derived from source id + output key) and commits it DIRECTLY onto refs/heads/main through the common mutation order, then stamps `source.lastIngestedAt`. `--dry-run` + `--apply` together ⇒ exit 5. Idempotent: a re-ingest of identical input is a NOOP (no duplicate note, no second commit) that still re-stamps.

id.description: The source registry id being ingested.

applied.description: True only when --apply performed the ingest.

preview.description: Present in preview mode: what an ingest WOULD produce (no persistence).

noteId.description: The deterministic produced-note id (source id + output key).

capture.description: Present in apply mode: the committed (or NOOP-confirmed) ingest result.

path.description: The vault-relative path the ingested note lands at.

committed.description: True iff a new commit landed; false on an idempotent NOOP (identical input).

canonicalSha.description: The canonical head after ingest; null only if unresolved.

lastIngestedAt.description: The RFC-3339 time stamped onto source.lastIngestedAt (last, after commit+refresh).

allOf.$comment: preview mode: never applied, WOULD-produce payload present, no committed capture.
apply mode: applied true, committed capture present, no preview payload.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Normalize a registered source (by id) + commit it as a note; --apply performs it. Intrinsically idempotent — the deterministic produced-note id makes a re-ingest of identical input a NOOP.

args.name: <id>
args.description: The source registry id to ingest (from `source add`).

flags.name: --apply
flags.description: Perform the ingest (default is a non-persisting preview).

sideEffects: apply: one direct commit of the produced note onto refs/heads/main (the common mutation order) + a projection refresh + a source.lastIngestedAt stamp; an idempotent NOOP re-ingest commits nothing and only re-stamps
prohibitedEffects: preview must persist nothing to any sink
a re-ingest of identical input must not produce a duplicate note or a second commit

locks.note: apply mode only — the common runMutation order

errorCodes.when: missing <id>, unknown flag, --dry-run with --apply, url source, or an unsupported/irregular file
unknown source id, unreadable source file, or a typed normalization rejection
apply on a detached/feature-branch HEAD (not refs/heads/main)
apply blocked by another vault mutation
